This is onty an outline and does not cover the variovs matters
falling in the province of each house. In India, among the middle and
higher classes. it is the male member who earns. The women and
chiklren. until the latter starts a career, are dependant on the male
member for their livelihood. Good or bad luck of the wife may be reflected
on the husband but as far as Yogas for earning are concerned. they
remaWl WI cold storage.
Whatever be the planetary positions. millions of people in rural or
ildustrial sectors work as labourers. Millions of housewives work in that
capacity and their means of livelihood is dependant on their husbands,
sons or brothers. It ts useless to examine or analyse their horoscope.
Horoscopes of onfy those persons should be examined who have an
option to follow profession and in such cases the signifcance of the
house and planet prominent in the chart will reveal the ablity to earn in
a particular manner.
